allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Moving scaffold to target ==="; $src = "d:\\tmp\\nextscaffold"; $dst = "d:\\Study\\work\\New folder"; Get-ChildItem -Force -Path $src | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -Force -Path $_.FullName -Destination $dst }; Write-Output "Moved. Target now contains:"; Get-ChildItem -Force $dst | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== npm cache size ==="; $c = "C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\npm-cache"; if \(Test-Path $c\) { "{0:N2} GB" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB\) })
PowerShell(npm cache clean --force; Write-Output "=== C: free after clean ==="; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='Free\(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}})
PowerShell(Write-Output "=== git identity ==="; $name = git config --get user.name; $email = git config --get user.email; Write-Output "name=$name"; Write-Output "email=$email")

PowerShell(git init; git add -A; Write-Output "=== Is .mcp.json staged? \(should be EXCLUDED\) ==="; $staged = git diff --cached --name-only; if \($staged -contains ".mcp.json"\) { Write-Output "WARNING: .mcp.json IS STAGED!" } else { Write-Output "OK: .mcp.json is NOT staged \(secret protected\)" }; Write-Output "=== staged file count ==="; \($staged | Measure-Object\).Count)
